title: Fig. 3 in Mitochondrial DNA reveals the impact of Pleistocene glaciations on a widespread palearctic bat species
author: Gojznikar, Jan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3 Median-joining haplotype networks for the four marker sequences ND1 (a), CytB (b), COI (c), and 16 S RNA (d). Smaller coloured circles represent a single sequence, while the larger represent two or three. Hala refers to H. alaschanicus and Hstu to H. stubbei
steps_raw: Fig. 3 Median-joining haplotype networks for the four marker sequences ND1 (a), CytB (b), COI (c), and 16 S RNA (d). Smaller coloured circles represent a single sequence, while the larger represent two or three. Hala refers to H. alaschanicus and Hstu to H. stubbei
